data.title: Binance Research: The current 50% pullback is a mild adjustment compared to previous cycles.
data.description: Binance Research published an article on the X platform stating that the 50% drop since the all-time high in October 2025 represents a mild correction compared to previous cycles, reflecting reduced volatility as the market matures.

data.title: Web3 Top 10 Events: Navigating the Rise of the Agentic Economy
data.description:
The most significant breakthroughs are built when the markets are quiet.   This month, we’ve seen that the global crypto circuit is less about price speculation and more about the rise of the Agentic Economy, a frontier where AI agents are transitioning from simple tools to autonomous economic actors. Understanding this new frontier and aligning with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/web3-top-10-events-navigating-the-rise-of-the-agentic-economy/

data.title: Is Bitcoin ‘no longer digital gold?’ Bloomberg analyst says NO!
data.description:
The BTC/gold ratio dropped by nearly 70% and fell close to 2022's lows.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/is-bitcoin-no-longer-digital-gold-bloomberg-analyst-says-no/

data.title: Shiba Inu At Risk of 70% Decline? Price Breaks Below Parallel Channel
data.description:
An analyst has pointed out how Shiba Inu’s break below the support line of a Parallel Channel could open the door to a target of $0. 00000138. Shiba Inu Has Fallen Under Parallel Channel Support In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has shared a technical analysis (TA) pattern that Shiba Inu has seemingly broken out of recently. The pattern in question is a “Parallel Channel,” which is a type of consolidation channel that forms whenever an asset’s price trades between two parallel trendlines
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/shiba-inu-coin/shiba-inu-70-decline-price-breaks-parallel-channel/

data.title: Greeks.live: Nearly $2.9 billion worth of BTC and ETH options settled today, with put options dominating.
data.description: Greeks.live posted on the X platform that 38,000 BTC options were settled, with a put-call ratio of 0.71, a maximum price threshold of $74,000, and a notional value of $2.5 billion. 215,000 ETH options were settled, with a put-call ratio of 0.82, a maximum price threshold of $2,100, and a notional value of $410 million. The crypto market continued its decline, with the maximum price threshold decreasing rapidly. Options settled today represent 9% of total open interest, with a total value of nearly $2.9 billion. This week, implied volatility for Bitcoin and Ethereum has decreased, with BTC's main term IV falling to 50% and ETH to 70%. Although the price decline has slowed, market confidence remains weak. In terms of trading activity, put options dominate. After yesterday's market decline, some bargain hunting has begun. Key options indicators show that Skew is rebounding, and the proportion of call options in large trades is increasing. The market remains in a bearish phase, but the most severe decline is over. Currently, the crypto market lacks new capital inflows, making it premature to discuss a bull market or a significant rebound.

data.title: Taiwan Considers Stricter Capital Requirements for Insurers
data.description: Taiwan's financial regulator is contemplating new measures that would require life insurers to hold additional capital against certain lower-rated government bond holdings. Bloomberg posted on X, indicating that this move is part of a broader effort by authorities to enhance risk controls within the financial sector. The proposed changes aim to ensure that insurers maintain sufficient capital buffers to mitigate potential risks associated with their investment portfolios. This initiative reflects a growing concern over the stability of financial institutions amid fluctuating market conditions. The regulator's decision is expected to impact how insurers manage their assets and liabilities, potentially influencing their investment strategies moving forward.

data.title: Ink Ecosystem's Nado DEX Launches Builder Codes on Mainnet
data.description: Nado, a decentralized exchange within the Ink ecosystem, has launched Builder Codes on its mainnet. According to Foresight News, the official statement indicates that when users conduct transactions using the Builder Codes protocol, a portion of the protocol fees will be automatically routed to developers.

data.title: 21Shares expands its partnership with BitGo to provide staking and custody support for European and American ETPs.
data.description: Cryptocurrency exchange-traded product (ETP) issuer 21Shares announced a significant expansion of its partnership with BitGo, aiming to provide enhanced custody and staking services for its ETP products in the US and Europe. According to a statement released Thursday, BitGo will act as a qualified custodian, execution partner, and staking provider, supporting a wider range of 21Shares ETP products. Furthermore, through BitGo's regulated platform, 21Shares will be able to introduce staking rewards to its products, allowing investors to earn network rewards while ensuring asset security. As of February 2026, 21Shares manages over $5 billion in assets.

data.title: Nikkei Index Falls Below 57,000 Points Amid Two-Day Decline
data.description: The Nikkei Index experienced a two-day decline, dropping below the 57,000-point mark. According to RTHK, the index fell by nearly 990 points at its lowest, reaching 56,652 points. It closed at 56,941 points, marking a decrease of 697 points or 1.21%. Despite this downturn, the index has risen nearly 5% over the week, continuing a two-week upward trend.

data.title: 21Shares Expands Partnership with BitGo for Enhanced Digital Asset Services
data.description: 21Shares has announced an expansion of its partnership with digital asset custodian BitGo. According to PANews, BitGo will provide institutional-grade custody, trade execution, liquidity access, and staking services for 21Shares' ETPs listed in the U.S. and European markets. As 21Shares expands its product line, BitGo will offer secure digital asset storage for its U.S. ETFs and European ETPs, introducing electronic market and OTC trading support to reduce delays in large crypto asset transfers. Additionally, BitGo will offer staking yield services through its regulated platform to meet institutional investors' needs for asset security and returns.

data.title: BOJ Member Suggests Possible Interest Rate Hike by Spring
data.description: A member of the Bank of Japan (BOJ) has suggested that conditions for the central bank's next interest rate hike could be met by spring. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this comment may intensify speculation about an earlier-than-expected move by the BOJ. The statement comes amid ongoing discussions about the timing of potential monetary policy adjustments. The BOJ has been closely monitoring economic indicators to determine the appropriate timing for any changes in interest rates. This development is likely to be closely watched by financial markets and analysts as they assess the implications for Japan's economic outlook.

data.title: China Mandates Physical Controls for Car Safety Functions
data.description: China has introduced new regulations targeting the minimalist, screen-centric car interiors popularized by companies such as Tesla and Xiaomi. Bloomberg posted on X that the new rules require essential safety functions in vehicles to be operated through physical switches or buttons. This move aims to enhance safety by ensuring that drivers can easily access critical controls without relying solely on digital interfaces. The decision reflects China's commitment to maintaining high safety standards in the automotive industry.

data.title: Mass Liquidations on October 10, 2025 Draw Trader Attention
data.description: Santiment posted on X that the widespread liquidations reported on October 10, 2025, have captured the attention of traders. The trading community is actively investigating the implications of these events, seeking to understand their impact on the market. The focus remains on analyzing the causes and potential outcomes of these liquidations, as traders aim to navigate the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: Capgemini CEO Highlights AI Adoption as Key to Sales Growth
data.description: Capgemini CEO Aiman Ezzat announced that the French IT company is strategically shifting its focus to support the adoption of artificial intelligence, which is expected to drive sales growth this year. Bloomberg posted on X, emphasizing the company's commitment to integrating AI technologies into its offerings. Ezzat noted that this pivot is a significant move for Capgemini, aligning with industry trends and client demands for advanced technological solutions. The CEO expressed confidence that embracing AI will enhance the company's competitive edge and contribute to its financial performance. As businesses increasingly seek AI-driven innovations, Capgemini aims to position itself as a leader in this transformative sector.

data.title: A whale deposited $4.8 million into HyperLiquid and used 20x leverage to short ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a large whale (0x982...ED8A) deposited $4.8 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a 20x leveraged short position in ETH. The ETH short position is currently increasing. Six days ago, this same whale deposited $2.4 million USDC and opened a 10x leveraged short position in HYPE and a 20x leveraged long position in BTC. Currently, its HYPE short position is $8.8 million, its ETH short position is $890,000, and its BTC long position is $3 million.

data.title: Bybit and Mercuryo Offer Zero-Fee Crypto Purchases in Select Markets
data.description:
Bybit partners with Mercuryo to offer zero-fee USDT and USDC purchases via One-Click Buy for select markets from Feb. 4–18, 2026.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/bybit-and-mercuryo-offer-zero-fee-crypto-purchases-in-select-markets/

data.title: Agentic Economy Gains Momentum Despite Cryptocurrency Price Decline
data.description:
Crypto KOL Haotian Cryptoinsight posted on X that despite the decline in the price of $Molt, the registration of agents on the Moltbook platform has surpassed 2.6 million, indicating a significant platform effect. This development suggests a decoupling of the Agentic Economy from the AI MEME token concept. Over the past two years, the AI Agent token boom and the x402 protocol have been driven by MEME token issuance and wealth creation effects. However, the narrative driven by token prices often leads to its destruction once the wealth myth collapses.

Moltbook is demonstrating a different kind of resilience. Users continue to deploy agents on the platform, which serves as a foundational space for social interaction, identity verification, and command distribution, becoming an incubator for the Agentic Economy. These millions of agents are not only engaging in conversations but are also discovering tasks, executing them, and participating in decentralized governance. They can earn rewards through micropayments facilitated by the x402 protocol.

A commercial ecosystem characterized by value creation, collaboration, and reward distribution is gradually taking shape. Importantly, this growth momentum is not controlled by token prices. The focus has shifted from token prices to the expanding Agentic silicon-based commercial society. Even without the stimulus of token prices, these 2.6 million agents continue to post, interact, trade, and even form 'digital religions' and 'prompt black markets.'

Previously, agents were created for token issuance, but now economic activity is generated through agent interconnectivity. This shift away from the MEME token speculation model towards growth driven by intrinsic platform value marks the true beginning of the Agentic Economy's potential. The outlook for the Agentic Economy remains optimistic.

data.title: XRP Ledger Expands Escrow Functionality with XLS-85 Amendment
data.description: The XRP Ledger has activated the XLS-85 amendment, which extends native escrow functionality to Trustline-based and Multi-Purpose Tokens. According to NS3.AI, this development facilitates secure conditional settlements beyond XRP itself, enhancing the utility of the XRPL for institutional use cases and tokenized finance. The upgrade is expected to potentially increase demand for XRP through higher network activity and fees. While the immediate price effects on XRP remain uncertain, the broader adoption of escrow-enabled tokens could strengthen long-term fundamentals and market sentiment.

data.title: Norway's Wealth Fund Severs Ties with Turkish Finance Firm
data.description: Norway's $2.1 trillion sovereign wealth fund has ended its association with a Turkish financial company following a regulatory fine imposed on one of its senior managers for improper trading activities. Bloomberg posted on X that the decision to cut ties was influenced by the manager's involvement in trading practices that violated established norms. The wealth fund, known for its rigorous ethical standards, regularly reviews its investments to ensure compliance with its guidelines. This move underscores the fund's commitment to maintaining integrity in its investment portfolio. The Turkish firm, which has not been named, is reportedly reassessing its internal controls in response to the incident. The wealth fund's decision highlights the importance of ethical conduct in financial markets and the potential consequences of regulatory breaches.

data.title: Boerse Stuttgart Group to Merge Crypto Operations with Tradias
data.description: German stock exchange operator Boerse Stuttgart Group is planning to merge its cryptocurrency operations with Frankfurt-based digital asset trader Tradias. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this strategic move aims to enhance the capabilities and reach of both entities in the digital asset market. The merger is expected to create a more robust platform for trading and managing digital assets, leveraging the strengths of both companies. This development comes as part of a broader trend of consolidation in the cryptocurrency sector, as firms seek to expand their offerings and improve their competitive edge in the rapidly evolving market.
